---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a product, architecture, or implementation improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What user or operator problem are we solving?

## Proposal

What do you want to change?

## Why this fits vibegram

Explain how it fits the current product stance:

- Telegram General topic plus session topics
- quiet supervision, not terminal mirroring
- app-owned session identity
- safe automation with human escalation for critical items

## Docs impacted

Which docs should change if this is accepted?

- [ ] `docs/decisions.md`
- [ ] `docs/architecture.md`
- [ ] `docs/telegram-model.md`
- [ ] `docs/provider-model.md`
- [ ] `docs/session-context.md`
- [ ] `docs/automation-safety.md`
- [ ] `docs/diagrams.md`
- [ ] other:

## Additional context

Anything else we should know?
